description.ko: 검은 흑요석 구조가 디지털 파편으로 산산조각 나는 모습을 통해 질서에서 나타나는 혼돈을 기하학적으로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A sharp, geometric exploration of chaos emerging from order, featuring a black obsidian structure shattering into digital fragments.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian prism by KURO-X, titled 'The Monolithic Disruption.' The structure undergoes a violent mathematical deconstruction, fracturing into a vortex of sharp #808080 and #C0C0C0 polygonal shards against a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Intense pixel-sorting artifacts, digital scanlines, and heavy chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting planes. Unreal Engine 5 style, 8k resolution, capturing precise mathematical chaos.
